displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #16
synopsis: The Battle of Eriadu rages on, as shocking developments continue to shift the tide of the conflict! A Nihil victory seems all but assured, thanks to their overwhelming forces and savage tactics. But will the unexpected arrival of a powerful combatant dash their evil ambitions? The Warden won’t give up easily, and he will do anything to defeat the Jedi! • The Battle of Eriadu rages on! • Issues 14-17 create one large connected landscape image! • Ongoing series.
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #16
